guides.text: Truth (⊤) is always provable. Since it requires no assumptions, we can apply NEC to put a box on it: necessary truth is still truth.
First, prove ⊤ with `top-intro`. The context is empty — exactly what NEC needs.
Apply `box-intro` to step 1. The context must be empty (it is!), so we derive □⊤.
□⊤ — truth is necessary. The simplest possible modal theorem.
